name: io.github.qingkongzhiqian/groundapi
title: GroundAPI
description: Real-time data API for AI Agents. 11 MCP tools across 3 categories: Finance (stock data with 11 aspects, market overview, stock screener, universal search across 11,780+ securities, gold price), Information (web search, news headlines, trending topics, daily briefing), Life Services (weather/forecast, calendar). One API key, 500 free calls/month.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Your GroundAPI API key. Sign up at https://groundapi.net to get one.
